verdict.label: FULL_GREEN
verdict.reason: The v0.7.1 WSH @ TB Stage-2a repeat capital-safety canary completed the full lifecycle: official final score Washington Nationals 2, Tampa Bay Rays 5 was verified; contest 51 was scored; speculation 40 settled to home/lower/Tampa Bay Rays; the winning controlled live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; final claim sweeps, public commitments/orderbook, and live-MM process checks are zero.

capabilities.notes: WSH away @ TB home contest 51/spec 40 passed official pre-game status, identity, allowlist, and quote-ready gates.
v0.7.1 CLI/SDK and MM SHA/pins verified; prior install/build/typecheck/test/smoke evidence reused because SHA and pins were unchanged.
Reserved live maker and controlled taker were clean before start after TOR/CHC cleanup; balances/allowances were sufficient and bounded.
No unlimited approvals; live auto-approval stayed off; existing PositionModule allowances were bounded.
Pre-live quote dry-run for contest 51 returned pipeline=computed and canQuote=true.
Live commitments posted under strict allowlist [51], all target 51/40 only.
Exactly one controlled fill succeeded against live-posted commitment 0x19a0faa4… using mm-shakeout-flow-a.
Telemetry captured the fill with source own-state-stream.
Final public/API/MM visible-open exposure is zero and no orphan live MM process remained.
Not run for this Stage-2a repeat live-window artifact; final zero-exposure and process checks were run instead.
Official final score WSH 2, TB 5 was verified and contest 51 scored.
Speculation 40 settled to home/lower/Tampa Bay Rays.
Winning lower/Tampa Bay Rays live-fill and setup seed positions were claimed; losing upper/WSH positions are no-op.
Tracked live maker risk and combined open+active maker risk stayed within Stage-2a caps; postgame gas recorded.

transactions.purpose: Setup seed/open fill for contest 51 before live canary.
Exactly one controlled live fill against the live MM quote.
Settle speculation 40 to home/lower/Tampa Bay Rays.
Claim controlled live taker winning position.
Claim setup seed taker winning position.
